title: デビュー戦の後に・そして明星は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satisfaction and joy fill Admire Vega's heart after
her incredible debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also feels relief, having managed to begin
making amends with her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to dedicate even greater victories to her
sister, she suggests the Hopeful Stakes as her
next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I agree with her, and we begin a training regimen
even more intense than before.
